checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export the live session state to disk via `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export`. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

latest_authoritative_state.next_slice: Advance Persona A through Week 3 from the week-02 checkpoint. Objective: push toward 500 Credits for Education Level 1 while protecting the reduced sanity buffer after the Week 2 laceration event.

action_constraints: Advance exactly one completed in-game week unless a blocker or unusually high-signal audit event stops the slice earlier.
Update run-state.json plus the relevant workflow markdown files in the same run.
Export a fresh checkpoint after every authoritative completed week.
Prefer compact state probes and selector recipes over broad DOM or file dumps.
